name: Chocolate Frosted Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 24 ounces cream cheese, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. To prepare crust, mix together chocolate crumbs and melted butter in a medium bowl until well blended. Press into a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Preheat oven to 300°F.
3. In a large bowl, beat together cream cheese, sugar, and eggs at Medium speed until smooth and fluffy. Spoon half of the cream cheese mixture into the crust.
4. Stir melted chocolate into the remaining cream cheese mixture until well blended. Drizzle over the batter in the crust to make swirls.
5. Bake cheesecake for 50 minutes. Transfer the pan to a wire rack and cool completely.
6. Transfer the cheesecake to a serving plate, cover with plastic wrap, and chill for 2 hours.
7. Uncover the cheesecake. Carefully remove the side of the pan.
8. To prepare frosting, mix together melted chocolate and sour cream in a small bowl. Spread over the cheesecake. Decorative edges can be made. Chill briefly until the frosting is set.
